title: Cobbled Lemon
description: Cobbled Lemon is a cobblemon based modpack that is assisted by datapacks, resourcepacks and qol mods! Create and other helpful mods are also in here to give a smooth and enjoyable experience!
body: Cobbled Lemon serves as a medium to light sized modpack that is centered around the cobblemon mod. This modpack features over 120 mods along with numerous datapacks and resourcepacks that add some additional missing pokemon! Numerous mods have been configed and changed to give a unique and fun experience as well. QOL mods for both cobblemon spefically and general gameplay are also present in this pack. Create (along with a few addons) are to spice up your farms and automation. To top this all off, mods such as Terralith, Nullscape and Incendium are added to give a renewed sense of awe to the minecraft world.
